/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g -D_DEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libUABE_Generic.so -o libUABE_Generic.so CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/AppContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/AssetContainerList.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/AssetIterator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/AsyncTask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/CreateEmptyValueField.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/FileContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/FileContextInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/FileModTree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/IProgressIndicator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/AssetPluginUtil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/TaskStatusTracker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/UABE_Generic.dir/PluginManager.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/AssetsTools:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/ModInstaller:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build ../AssetsTools/libAssetsTools.so ../ModInstaller/libModInstaller.so ../libCompression/liblibCompression.a ../libStringConverter/liblibStringConverter.a -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build/CrnlibWrap:/home/runner/work/UABE/UABE/build
